title: Auto Mode Feature Launch
description: Claude Code launched a new 'Auto Mode' feature on March 12, 2026. Additionally, Claude Code access was added to Team plan Standard seats, expanding availability to enterprise team users.

community_feedback.quote: FYI, claude code 'auto' mode may launch as soon as tomorrow
Anthropic announced a research preview feature called Auto Mode for Claude Code, expected to roll out no earlier than March 12, 2026
We'll see how auto mode ends up working - my tool could end up being complementary, or a good alternative for those that prefer more granular control

title: Version 1.9577.24 - GPT-5.4 Support
description: Windsurf released GPT-5.4 with limited-time promotional pricing. The update includes new reasoning tiers (No Reasoning at 1x credits through Extra High Reasoning at 8x credits), along with bug fixes for Jupyter Notebook performance, Cascade UI rendering, and improvements to notifications and context management.

community_feedback.quote: GPT-5.4's deeper exploration and higher attention to detail compared to other tested models

title: Visual Studio Code v1.110 February Release
description: GitHub Copilot released enhanced agent capabilities for longer-running and complex tasks, improved control over agent workflows, and security updates in version 1.110.1 addressing issues in core and the GitHub Copilot Chat extension.

community_feedback.quote: Since we're talking about GitHub Copilot I'll lodge my biggest complaint about it here! The context window is stuck at 128k for all models
The Visual Studio Code February 2026 release makes agents practical for longer-running and more complex tasks

title: Version 0.107.0 - Improved Approval Flows
description: Codex CLI 0.107.0 released with improved approval prompts and app connection sign-in flows, along with additional performance improvements and bug fixes.

community_feedback.quote: running npx @siteboon/claude-code-ui which discovers existing sessions from ~/.claude/projects/

title: Version 0.106.0 - macOS Direct Install
description: Codex CLI 0.106.0 added a direct install script for macOS, simplifying the installation process for Mac users.

title: v3 API Updates - February 2026
description: Devin released v3 API updates in February 2026. The v3 API came out of beta and is now the primary API for all Devin functionality, providing role-based access control, session attribution, and new capabilities.

community_feedback.quote: Where did Devin go? What does it say about the future of AI dev tools?
Devin 2.2 update from Cognition with Desktop support

title: New Model Picker & Cascade Hooks
description: Windsurf introduced a new model picker that groups models by family with hovercards showing specific variants like reasoning effort and speed. Added POST_CASCADE_RESPONSE_WITH_TRANSCRIPT hook, Cascade hooks configuration visibility, and multiple platform improvements including Linux ARM64 support.
